name: The Lending Group Company
description_short: The Lending Group Co. is a mortgage lender operating in PA, NJ, DE, FL, GA, and CA, offering home purchase loans, refinancing, and specialized "rescue loans" for non-traditional borrowers.
description_long:
The Lending Group Co. is a mortgage lender licensed to operate in Pennsylvania, New Jersey, Delaware, Georgia, Florida, and California. The company positions itself as a solution-oriented lender focused on homeownership accessibility and financial stability. They market their services primarily through a website emphasizing ease of process and personalized guidance.

The company offers several mortgage-related services including home purchase loans, refinancing options, FHA loans, conventional loans, and what they term "Rescue Loans"—custom mortgage programs for borrowers who don't qualify for traditional lending. They highlight flexibility in loan programs, mention state and local grants, and reference seller-assisted closing cost programs. The website also contains a rental property section, though the primary business appears to be mortgage lending. Two MLOs (Mortgage Loan Officers) are listed: Leon Belov and Marat Tsirelson.

The Lending Group Co. differentiates itself by claiming to serve borrowers "who don't fit the traditional lending mold" and positioning themselves as willing to work with cases other lenders decline. They emphasize transparency, personalized solutions, and partnerships with real estate professionals. The company presents itself as a long-term partner rather than a transactional lender.

However, the website contains several red flags: incomplete customer testimonials, placeholder content (satisfied customers and experience years shown as "0"), a rental property section featuring Morocco properties unrelated to their stated service areas, and inconsistent branding. The vague "Rescue Loans" terminology lacks specific details about qualifying criteria, rates, or terms. No Better Business Bureau rating, state license verification links, or third-party reviews are provided on the website itself.
pros: Licensed in six states (PA, NJ, DE, FL, GA, CA) with explicit geographic transparency
Offers flexible loan programs including FHA loans, conventional mortgages, and refinancing options
Claims to specialize in non-traditional borrowers and cases declined by other lenders
Two named MLOs with direct phone contact numbers provided
Emphasizes transparent pricing with stated commitment to no hidden fees
Partners with real estate professionals and realtors
cons: Website contains placeholder content ("0" satisfied customers, "0" years experience) suggesting incomplete or template-based construction
Vague "Rescue Loans" program lacks specific details about terms, rates, qualifying criteria, or actual products offered
Includes unrelated rental property listings (Morocco) not connected to service areas, raising professionalism concerns
Incomplete customer testimonial on homepage cuts off mid-sentence without substantive review content
No verifiable third-party ratings, BBB profile, or external license verification links provided
best_for: First-time homebuyers in PA, NJ, DE, FL, GA, or CA seeking guided mortgage navigation
Homeowners looking to refinance existing mortgages or access home equity
Non-traditional borrowers with credit challenges or employment situations that may not fit standard lending criteria
diagnosis: The Lending Group Co. is positioned for homebuyers and refinancing clients in their six licensed states who want personalized mortgage guidance and may not fit traditional lending profiles. The primary caveat is that the website lacks substantive evidence of legitimacy—placeholder content, missing business metrics, and vague product descriptions make it difficult to assess actual loan offerings, rates, or real customer experience before direct contact.
meta_description: Mortgage lender in PA, NJ, DE, FL, GA, and CA offering home purchase loans, refinancing, and rescue loans.
